text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm headed to the cafeteria when...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Here you go. It's just a simple stewed dish, but
what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Mm! Every ingredient is infused with flavor, and
the taste is nice and mild! It's buono, buono! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Even though the hurdle for this isn't
very high, it's still embarrassing to receive such
enthusiastic praise.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
And I made a power salad that's packed with
protein and vitamins.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: This is both delicious and nutritious, so it gets a perfect buono from me! ☆ Good job!
choice_data_list: What are you all up to?
What are you all up to?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Hi Trainer! Don't all these dishes look
yummy?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We're throwing a dorm party soon, and
everyone's going to make a dish for it!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
We're having Akebono act as our taste tester
since she has such a refined palate.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Getting her seal of approval is the best
reassurance we can get that our food is good
enough to serve.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And I get to eat loads of delicious dishes, so I'm
as happy as a bug in a rug!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I still have room for more! Keep the grub coming,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little worried she'll end up overeating, but
she looks delighted to be sampling all the
different dishes and singing their praises.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little worried she'll end up overeating, but
she looks delighted to be sampling all the
different dishes and singing their praises.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You mean you want to help taste-test the dishes
too?
choice_data_list: Watching you made me kinda hungry...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I sure know how that feels! Hey, everyone,
is it okay for Trainer to join in?

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident
text_block_list.text: Sure! We'll take all the help we can get!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, by helping Hishi Akebono with the
taste-testing and eating a few portions myself, I
manage to keep her from overeating!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I definitely will! I'm really going to savor
all the food everyone worked so hard to make! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a huge smile on her face, Hishi Akebono
cleans every last plate that the Ritto Dorm
residents prepared.
